description: Deep iterative domain warping for swirling, acid-trip patterns. Noise eating its own tail.
example_prompts: use deep iterative domain warping for psychedelic swirling patterns
compose trippy acid-like textures by feeding noise through itself three times
create organic chaos using nested domain warp of FBM simplex

screenshot_metadata.notes: Map output to HSB hue for maximum color saturation. Animate time uniform slowly.
